features.headline: Everything You Need for Your Special Day
features.subheadline: From initial planning to the big day, NIKAHKU helps every step of the way.

items.title: Budget Management
items.description: Set your wedding budget with automatic allocation, real-time expense tracking, and clear visualizations.

items.title: Vendor Management
items.description: Find, compare, and manage all wedding vendors — from catering, decoration, to photography.

items.title: Guest List
items.description: Manage guest invitations easily, including RSVP tracking, grouping, and seat count.

items.title: Gift Tracker
items.description: Record and manage wedding gifts in detail — from gifts to dowry, complete with purchase status.

items.title: Planning Checklist
items.description: Monitor preparation progress with interactive Kanban board and structured timeline checklist.

items.title: Couple Collaboration
items.description: Invite your partner to plan together. One account, two managers, one perfect wedding.

howItWorks.headline: 3 Steps to Your Dream Wedding
howItWorks.subheadline: Get started in minutes, not weeks.

steps.title: Create Account & Fill Details
steps.description: Sign up for free, enter your wedding date and basic info. Our system will customize templates for you.

steps.title: Set Budget & Choose Vendors
steps.description: Set your total budget, allocate to each category, and start finding the right vendors.

steps.title: Monitor & Enjoy the Process
steps.description: Use the checklist and dashboard to monitor all progress. Focus on enjoying your special moments.

pricing.subheadline: Start free, upgrade anytime as needed.

testimonials.headline: Stories from Happy Couples
testimonials.subheadline: They've planned their dream wedding with NIKAHKU.

items.name: Rina & Andi
items.text: NIKAHKU really helped us manage our wedding budget. From being confused at first, now all expenses are neatly recorded and transparent.

items.name: Sari & Budi
items.text: The vendor comparison feature is amazing! We could compare prices and reviews before deciding. Saved us so much time.

items.name: Dina & Fajar
items.text: The planning checklist keeps us calm. All to-dos are organized with a clear timeline. Highly recommended!

items.question: Is NIKAHKU free?
items.answer: Yes! NIKAHKU is completely free to use. We believe every couple deserves organized wedding planning.

items.question: How do I invite my partner?
items.answer: After creating an account, you can invite your partner through the 'Invite Partner' feature on the dashboard. Just enter their email.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely! We use Supabase with end-to-end encryption to keep your personal data secure. Privacy is our priority.

items.question: Can I access it from my phone?
items.answer: NIKAHKU is a PWA (Progressive Web App) that can be accessed from any browser and installed like a native app on your phone.

items.question: Can I export guest data?
items.answer: Yes, you can export your guest list in an easy-to-use format for invitation printing or venue coordination needs.

items.question: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
items.answer: The Free plan includes all basic features. Premium gives unlimited access for guests and vendors, detailed reports, data export, and priority support.

contact.headline: Have Questions? We're Here to Help
contact.subheadline: Our team is ready to help you plan your dream wedding.

finalCta.headline: Ready to Plan Your Dream Wedding?
